text: Moving from sterile corridors and a glass-walled meeting room to the vivid, inviting colors of the R+D space, I feel as if I am traversing a threshold between order and creativity. The first scene makes me contemplative—its emptiness and clarity suggest potential, a place awaiting purpose. In contrast, the second scene energizes me: the wall’s colors and playful design celebrate the curiosity and experimentation that drive progress. My mind oscillates between calm and stimulation, sensing the dual nature of human environments—structured yet always reaching toward something beyond the known.
